issue_title: Non-rounded rectangle line width is broken
issue_body_preview:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3630663/71786445-5513ef80-2fd9-11ea-84fc-8fd1e8a973d2.png)

**To reproduce:**
- Select rectangle tool
- Hit Numpad + to increase stroke size
- Draw rectangle

**Expected:**
Rectangle outline width should increase

**Actual:**
The rectangl
test_description_zh: 选择矩形工具（非圆角矩形），通过小键盘 + 键增大线条粗细，然后在画布上绘制一个矩形，观察矩形边框的线条宽度。
expected_result_zh: 矩形的边框线条宽度应随着线条粗细的增大而相应变粗，正确反映当前设置的描边宽度。
